scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run -w dudo-dice dev
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run -w @dudo-dice/server dev
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run -w dudo-dice build
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run -w @dudo-dice/server build
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run -w dudo-dice build && npm run -w @dudo-dice/server build
scripts.qa:all: npm run qa:unit && npm run qa:e2e
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:frontend
scripts.verify:strict: npm run lint:frontend && npm run verify
